summary: User request materialized: use v1.10 baseline, repair identified issues, document GOAL/Objectives, comply with applicable ADOS requirements, produce v1.11 zip.
v1.11 plan maps request to typed payload repair, fail-closed decision logic, settings confidence, README authority, and ADOS evidence surfaces.
v1.10 failed run reviewed; all-row HTTP 400 path and invalid think serialization routed to repair.
Scripts patched for typed think payloads, API error capture, TOOL_FAILURE, no-ranking fail-closed behavior, settings confidence, and aggregate ranking gates.
README rewritten with GOAL, Objectives, command modes, settings confidence, decision-grade rules, and troubleshooting.
Syntax checks and fake success/failure/aggregate harnesses passed.
Replay cases confirm valid model, API failure, aggregate comparison, and README understanding paths.
Stress tests cover payload typing, API 400 handling, all-row failure, aggregate success, and package hygiene.
Applicable ADOS requirements mapped to goal/objectives, SOT, evidence ledger, schema/data discipline, compaction, self-evaluation, and finalization evidence.
v1.11 source package and quality evidence package finalized with SHA256 manifests.
Final v1.11 repair gates context-pressure rows by minimum output and excludes short context rows from visible speed averages.
One-token context simulation produced context_validated=0, CONTEXT_PRESSURE_INCONCLUSIVE, and MEDIUM_PARTIAL settings.
Routine ollama test defaults to resident-warm to reduce repeated first-load test time; ollama diagnose keeps full empty-card and context-pressure diagnostics.
Final v1.11 package produced after syntax, JSON/JSONL, package hygiene, and scoring-gate verification.
